Container.Name: PrintStash-Frontend
Container.Overview: Web UI for PrintStash, a self-hosted vault for 3D print files. This is the container you open in your browser. It serves the SPA and proxies /api/v1 to the PrintStash-API container at hostname "api", so both MUST run on the same user-defined Docker network named "printstash". Install PrintStash-API first.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: 3d printing stl gcode 3mf moonraker klipper bambu vault
Container.Requires: Requires the PrintStash-API container running on the same "printstash" Docker network (it must be reachable as hostname "api").

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to open PrintStash in your browser.

Config.Name: Max upload size
Config.Description: nginx client_max_body_size. Match the API VAULT_MAX_UPLOAD_MB (e.g. 512m).
